summary: Comprehensive testing of backend refactoring and JD Builder multi-file upload. All 20 backend API tests pass. All frontend features verified: multi-file upload (up to 5), file preview/remove, generate with context, edit, download (docx/pdf/txt).

backend: POST /api/auth/login - valid credentials return user info ✓
GET /api/auth/me - returns current user with session cookie ✓
POST /api/ai/generate with context - works with additional context ✓
POST /api/ai/download (docx) - downloads as Word (PK magic bytes) ✓
POST /api/ai/download (pdf) - downloads as PDF (%PDF magic bytes) ✓
frontend: Login flow works correctly ✓
Dashboard navigation works ✓
AI Tools page loads with 5 tool cards ✓
JD Builder tool detail loads ✓
JD Builder shows file upload zone ✓
JD Builder shows 'Upload Files for Context (max 5)' label ✓
JD Builder - single file upload works ✓
JD Builder - multiple files upload works ✓
JD Builder - file count shows (2/5 files uploaded) ✓
JD Builder - file preview toggle works ✓
JD Builder - remove file button present ✓
JD Builder - clear all files button present ✓
JD Builder - generate with file context works ✓
JD Builder - edit button present after generate ✓
JD Builder - edit textarea appears on edit ✓
JD Builder - save/cancel edit buttons work ✓
JD Builder - download dropdown shows Word/PDF/Text options ✓
JD Builder - txt download works ✓
search-strategy does NOT show file upload zone ✓
candidate-research does NOT show file upload zone ✓
dossier does NOT show file upload zone ✓
client-research does NOT show file upload zone ✓

critical_code_review_comments: Backend refactoring to modular routers (auth, challenges, answers, ai_tools, dashboard) is well organized
All API endpoints properly prefix with /api through the main router
JD Builder multi-file upload correctly uses uploadedFiles array state
File context is properly concatenated before AI generation
Other AI tools correctly do NOT show file upload zone (only JD Builder shows it)
Previous iteration's issue with renderMarkdown not handling '---' was already fixed (line 203 in AITools.js)
seed_data_creation: Created 2 test challenges during backend testing (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend refactoring complete - all endpoints working via modular routers. JD Builder multi-file upload fully functional: up to 5 files, preview/remove buttons, clear all, file context combined for AI generation. Edit and download (docx/pdf/txt) all working. Other AI tools correctly do not show file upload zone. Test credentials: saba@bestpl.ai / Bestpl2026!. Login testid: login-submit-btn. Nav to AI tools: nav-link-ai-tools. AI generation can take 30-60s.
rca_of_issue: No issues found. All features working as expected.
